results.notes: ✔ TC-010h: readAitriState — returns aitriVersion, updatedAt, createdAt when present
✔ TC-010e1: evaluateIntegrationAlert — null when CLI equals reviewed
✔ TC-010e2: evaluateIntegrationAlert — null when CLI is older
✔ TC-010f: readAitriState — returns null for aitriVersion, updatedAt, createdAt when absent
✔ TC-011h: readAitriState — artifactsDir spec preserved when explicit
✔ TC-011h2: readFeaturePipelines — two features, correct aggregation
✔ TC-011e1: readFeaturePipelines — absent features/ directory
✔ TC-011e2: readFeaturePipelines — feature without test results
✔ TC-011f: readAitriState — artifactsDir defaults to empty string when field absent
✔ TC-011f2: readFeaturePipelines — malformed .aitri skipped
✔ TC-012h: detectDrift — driftPhases fast path returns hasDrift=true
✓ TC-012h2: FeatureSummarySection renders toggle button and section when featurePipelines is non-empty (Vitest/jsdom)
✓ TC-012h3: IntegrationAlertBanner renders banner with message and link when alert is non-null (Vitest/jsdom)
✓ TC-012e1: IntegrationAlertBanner renders nothing when data has no integrationAlert (Vitest/jsdom)
✓ TC-012f: FeatureSummarySection is absent when featurePipelines is empty array (Vitest/jsdom)
✓ TC-012f2: IntegrationAlertBanner is absent when alert prop is null (Vitest/jsdom)
✔ TC-013h: detectDrift — hasDrift=false when artifact matches stored hash
✔ TC-013e1: semver regex extracts version from banner-style output
✔ TC-013f: detectDrift — hasDrift=true when artifact differs from stored hash
✔ TC-013f2: VERSION_REGEX handles no-match gracefully
✔ TC-014h: writeDashboard — writes featurePipelines and aggregatedTcTotal
✔ TC-014h2: writeDashboard — integrationAlert at top level
✔ TC-014e1: writeDashboard — no features
✔ TC-014e2: writeDashboard — existing fields unaffected by new fields
✔ TC-014f: writeDashboard — output is always valid JSON
✔ TC-NFR010: readFeaturePipelines — 10 features completes in 5000ms or less
✔ TC-NFR011: readFeaturePipelines — malformed feature does not affect valid ones
✓ TC-NFR012: FeatureSummarySection is collapsed by default (Vitest/jsdom)
✔ TC-E2E-001: collectAll() embeds integrationAlert at top level; writeDashboard round-trips it correctly (node:test, tests/integration/e2e-collector-cycle.test.js)
✔ TC-E2E-002: collectAll() aggregatedTcTotal=91 (main 30 + feat-a 61); featurePipelines[0].tcCount=61; testSummary.total remains 30 (node:test, tests/integration/e2e-collector-cycle.test.js)
